settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDesc: Choose the display language for the dashboard UI.
settings.themeDesc: Choose the color theme for the dashboard.

boards.title: Boards
boards.subtitle: View registered board status, location, and connection info. Auto-refreshes every 30 seconds.
boards.deleteOnlineConfirm: Delete board "{{name}}"? A delete notification will be sent to the connected device; data is removed on the next heartbeat.
boards.deleteOfflineConfirm: Delete board "{{name}}" and all related data (UART, sessions, temperature, etc.)?
boards.deletePendingAlert: Delete request sent for "{{name}}". Registration will be cleared when the device sends its next heartbeat.
boards.registerHint: Name and BLE ID are required.

protocols.title: Protocols
protocols.subtitle: Define UART packet structures and reusable parse_rules templates.
protocols.editSubtitle: Define packet structure in the UI; parse_rules JSON is generated automatically.
protocols.fieldRequired: At least one field is required.

templates.editSubtitle: Reusable parse_rules preset for Protocol Edit → Load template.

dataViewer.title: UART Data
dataViewer.subtitle: Parsed results using the protocol (parse_rules) assigned to the board at collection time.
dataViewer.noProtocolHint: No protocol assigned to this board. Set one in the mobile app onboarding or on the Boards page.
dataViewer.noUartRecords: No UART records for this filter.

ai.title: AI Query
ai.subtitle: Query board data in natural language. Select a board first.

viz.title: Visualization
viz.subtitle: Visualize protocol fields as charts. Use Live mode for real-time data.
viz.selectBoardForProfiles: Select a board to save profiles
viz.noItems: No items. Use + Add All Fields above to add fields.
viz.zoomHint: Shift+drag: zoom region · Alt+drag: measure time · Drag: pan (zoomed) · Bottom bar: pan · Wheel: zoom · Double-click: reset

valuePanel.title: Field Values
valuePanel.placeholder: Hover the chart to see values at that time for all items.

viz.noChartData: No chart data. Select a board and protocol, then refresh.
viz.noVisibleItems: No series visible. Use the eye icon in Field Values or check items in Configuration.

guide.whyLabel: Why does it work this way?
guide.pointsSummary: This board has about {{total}} records. Exceeding the in-browser full-load limit ({{limitPoints}} points), the chart shows a {{sample}}-point sample overview of the full range.
guide.pointsWhy: All queries every record on the board with no time limit. When data exceeds the limit, the browser protects memory and response time by showing a downsampled overview instead of loading everything at once. Zooming fetches only the visible time window from the server for finer detail. Large datasets can make the first query and each zoom slower, and brief anomalies may be missed in the overview.
guide.pointsRecommend: Pick only the period you need in Time Range to load the full dataset in memory for fast pan and zoom without extra server requests. To see only the overall trend, choose Continue in sample mode below.
guide.bytesTitle: All time range — large estimated size
guide.bytesSummary: About {{total}} records (est. {{est}}) exceeds the in-browser load limit ({{limitBytes}}). Showing a {{sample}}-point sample overview.
guide.bytesWhy: Payload size grows with field count and value size. For All-time queries that exceed the limit, the browser uses a sample overview instead of a full in-memory load to avoid tab slowdowns. Zooming refetches each window from the server.
guide.bytesRecommend: Narrow the range to 7d or 30d to fit within the limit for full in-memory load and smoother interaction. To see only the overall trend, choose Continue in sample mode.
